name: env-soil
title: Soil Map of India (FAO DSMW)
description: Polygon-based soil classification map of India extracted from the FAO-UNESCO Digital Soil Map of the World (DSMW) at 1:5M scale — 634 soil mapping units with FAO soil class codes, dominant soil type, soil phases, permafrost status, and area in square kilometres.

sources.name: FAO Digital Soil Map of the World (DSMW)
